settings.title: Free Consultation
settings.description: A 30-minute call to discuss your goals, timeline, and questions. No pressure, no obligation — just honest guidance.

settings.title: Market Analysis
settings.description: Thinking of selling? Get a complimentary comparative market analysis for your property with no strings attached.

settings.title: Property Tour
settings.description: Ready to start looking? Schedule viewings of current listings and get a feel for what's available in your target area.

settings.title: Office Hours
settings.text:
Monday — Friday: 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM
Saturday: 10:00 AM – 3:00 PM
Sunday: By appointment

settings.question: What should I prepare for our first meeting?
settings.answer: If you're buying: bring your pre-approval letter (or I can connect you with a lender), a list of your must-haves and nice-to-haves, and your target neighborhoods. If you're selling: bring any recent appraisals, renovation records, and your ideal timeline.

settings.question: How long does it take to buy or sell a home?
settings.answer: In the current Boston market, well-priced homes typically sell within 2-3 weeks. The buying process from first search to closing usually takes 2-4 months, depending on inventory and financing. I'll give you a realistic timeline during our first conversation.

settings.question: Do I need to be pre-approved before we start looking?
settings.answer: Strongly recommended. Pre-approval tells you exactly what you can afford and shows sellers you're serious. In competitive markets like Boston, offers without pre-approval are rarely considered. I can recommend trusted lenders who make the process quick.

settings.question: Can you help with investment properties?
settings.answer: Yes. I work with individual investors and small portfolio holders on acquisitions, dispositions, and market analysis. Whether you're looking for your first rental or building a portfolio, I can help you evaluate opportunities with clear data.
